positions.detail: Up 86% — at or above 15% day-4 target. Consider taking profit.
Theta accelerating. Down -12%. Consider closing to limit further decay.
Up 42% — at or above 15% day-4 target. Consider taking profit.

agent_analysis:
## ELEVATED — Thursday Position Monitor

### GOOGL CALL | +86% | 🟢 TARGET HIT (5.7x day-4 target)
Outstanding winner. At +86% on day 4, this is deep ITM territory. Charm decay and theta are nearly irrelevant — delta is likely >0.70, making this behave like stock. But tomorrow's Friday theta cliff can still shave 10-20% off extrinsic value overnight. **No reason to hold for incremental upside. Lock this in.**

### AMZN CALL | +42% | 🟢 TARGET HIT (2.8x day-4 target)
Strong position, well above the 15% Thursday target. +1.9% stock move is doing the work, but with 1 day left, theta acceleration (~4%/day baseline, likely higher for weeklies this close to expiry) will erode premium aggressively overnight. Holding into Friday risks giving back 10-15 points for a chance at maybe 5-10 more. Risk/reward has flipped negative. **Take profit.**

### AMD CALL | -12% | 🟡 WARNING — APPROACHING DECAY TRAP
Stock flat at +0.0%. Original call thesis got zero directional confirmation over 4 days. With charm eating delta since Monday (estimated delta drift from ~0.35 to ~0.15-0.18 by now), this option is increasingly a pure theta burn. At -12% today, tomorrow's accelerated decay likely pushes this to -25% to -40% by Friday close even if AMD stays flat. Recovery requires a meaningful move that hasn't materialized all week. **Close to stop the bleed.**

---

### RECOMMENDATION

**Close all three positions now.**

GOOGL and AMZN are wins — take the money. Holding into Friday's theta cliff and liquidity deterioration (spreads widen after 3 PM) risks giving back gains for minimal upside. AMD is a slow-motion loss that only gets worse tomorrow; no signal confirmation after 4 days means the thesis failed.

Estimated portfolio day: **+86%, +42%, -12% → strong net positive.** Don't let Thursday's winners become Friday's regrets.
